body.title: Create /audit-goal skill — 7 checks + better-way challenge
body.result: Created /audit-goal skill — 7 checks + better-way challenge, PASS/AMEND output
body.description:
Goals need an audit the same way decisions and tickets do. /audit-goal runs 7 checks on any active goal and always ends with the challenge question.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/audit-goal/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** audit pattern matches audit-design and audit-ticket shape — PASS / AMEND output
**Scope boundary:** in scope: 7 checks: (1) positive target/approach-frame, (2) at least one measurable KR, (3) time horizon set, (4) why-now still valid, (5) linked decisions actually pointing at goal, (6) conflicts with other active goals named, (7) falsification condition exists. Plus mandatory challenge: 'Is there a better way to achieve this goal?' Out of scope: auto-running on every /goal create (that's a future gate); checking ticket-level alignment.
**Test plan:** skill file; manual smoke against one real goal.
